zh.lifeSummary: 當Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster於大約1050年出生在愛爾蘭蒙斯特時，他的父親Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland42歲，母親Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig40歲。他和Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen至少有1個女兒。他去世於1119年3月13日在愛爾蘭庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫享年70歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭庫迪 利默里克利默里克吉拉阿洛。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster于大约1050年出生在爱尔兰蒙斯特时，他的父亲Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland42岁，母亲Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig40岁。他和Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen至少有1个女儿。他去世于1119年3月13日在爱尔兰庫迪 沃特福德利斯莫享年70岁，埋葬在爱尔兰庫迪 利默里克利默里克吉拉阿洛。

nameMeanings.name: Ua
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Chinese: Teochew form of the surname 柯, see   Ke   1.

variants.name: Ke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Heng, Yong, Bin, Song, Yan, Zhi, Cheng, Chih-Ming, Chun-Yen, Fan, Fong, Gang.  Vietnamese Lan, Hai, Hoa, Le Van, Mui, Tuy.

Chinese: Mandarin form of the surname 柯, meaning ‘bough, stalk’ in Chinese: (i) from the first element of the personal name Ke Lu (柯盧), personal name of a prince of the state of Wu during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (ii) from the first element of the placename Ke Ze (柯澤), the name of a fief (located in Shandong province) granted to an official in the state of Qi during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ). (iii) traced back to the Qiang ethnic group in ancient western China and the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iv) adopted as a surname by the Ke Ba (柯拔) family from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ).

nameMeanings.name: Briain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Brittain  .

variants.name: Brittain
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Anglo-Norman French Bretagne, Bretaign(e) ‘Brittany’. Some of the modern forms are from the Middle English Brytane, Brittan ‘Breton’; compare Breton .

en.lifeSummary: When Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster was born about 1050, in Munster, Ireland, his father, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, was 42 and his mother, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, was 40. He had at least 1 daughter with Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. He died on 13 March 1119, in Lismore, County Waterford, Ireland, at the age of 70, and was buried in Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster est né environ 1050, à Munster, Irlande, son père, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, avait 40 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fille avec Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. Il est décédé le 13 mars 1119, à Lismore, County Waterford, Irlande, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster um 1050 in Munster, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland 42 und seine Mutter Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig 40. Er hatte mit Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen mindestens 1 Tochter. Er starb am 13. März 1119 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Lismore, County Waterford, Irland und wurde in Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster è nato il circa 1050 nel Munster, Irlanda, il suo padre, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, aveva 40 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlia con Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. Morì il 13 marzo 1119, nel Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munsterが約1050年にアイルランドムンスターで生まれた時，父Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Irelandは42歳，母Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraigは40歳であった。彼はCailleach Chrion O'Cuilenとの間に少なくとも1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1119年3月13日にアイルランドコウントイ ワテルフォードリスモーで70歳で死去し，アイルランドコウントイ リメリックリメリックキラロにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster(이)가 대략 1050년 아일랜드 먼스터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig(은)는 40세였다. 그는 Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen(와)과 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1119년 3월 13일 아일랜드 카운티 왓르퍼드 리스모어에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 카운티 라임릭 라임릭 킬라로이에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster nasceu aproximadamente 1050, em Munster, Irlanda, seu pai, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tinha 40 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filha com Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1119, em Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster родился около 1050 г. в местности мунстир, Ирландия, его отцу по имени Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, 40. У него была по крайней мере 1 дочь от Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. Он умер 13 марта 1119 г. в местности лисмор, коунти вэитирфорд, Ирландия в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности киллало, лимирикк, коунти лимирикк, Ирландия.

sm.from about 1075 to 1086: mai le e tusa o le 1075 e o'o I le 1086

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Muirchertach Ua Briain King of Ireland and Munster nació aproximadamente 1050, en Munster, Irlanda, su papá, Toirdhealbach Ua Briain High King of Ireland, tenía 42 años y su mamá, Derbforgaill ingen Tadhg Mac Giolla Pádraig, tenía 40 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hija con Cailleach Chrion O'Cuilen. Murió el 13 de marzo de 1119, en Lismore, County Waterford, Irlanda, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Killaloe, Limerick, County Limerick, Irlanda.
